provenance: Civic-only material minted via the add-material-raw skill, DECISIONS.md Art register FIFTH revision (Eli 2026-07-15): a physical clone of reman_concrete (identical density/hardness/flammability/conductivity/heatCapacity/value/tags/light/features) so the art-mapping can give ONLY the Quayward Compound's (C1) gate wall a colonnade-facade sprite (content/art/kenney/art-mapping.json) without repainting every plain reman_concrete wall in the district. No physical/simulation difference from reman_concrete whatsoever - this id exists purely to be a distinct art-resolution key.
notes: Byte-identical physical stats to reman_concrete.json; see that file for the reasoning behind each value. This material is never expected to appear anywhere except the C1 gate wall gen_docks_surface.py tags.
